docket_entries.description: INFORMATION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RE: FEE FOR CERTIFIED COPIES OF FILE; PLS.SEE FILE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,762.60 FILED BY FREMBLING, CANDICE M. AS TO DEFENDANT OVERHOLT, JAMES H.  PRESIDENT/CEO GREAT WESTERN FINANCIAL SECURITIES CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
